new_value: intelhex>=2.3 added to python/pyproject.toml dependencies. This ensures esptool post-processing and image packaging succeeds for all ESP32-S3 targets after linking (Heltec V3, T-Deck). Builder bootstrap and uv/pip installs now include it deterministically. Validated in west ESP32 builds. Completes cy6c packaging criterion.
